title: New BOQ Section
description: Create a section under a floor's bill to group related items.

steps.title: Section letter and name
steps.description: Sections are lettered A, B, C within a bill.
steps.voiceScript: Give the section its letter and name. Sections are lettered within a bill.
steps.captionText: Give the section its letter and name. Sections are lettered within a bill.
steps.fallbackMessage: Section letter and name: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Service
steps.description: The service decides which template items are offered.
steps.voiceScript: Choose the service. It decides which template items you can add.
steps.captionText: Choose the service. It decides which template items you can add.
steps.fallbackMessage: Service: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create the section
steps.description: The grid then lets you add and price items.
steps.voiceScript: Create the section, then add and price its items in the grid.
steps.captionText: Create the section, then add and price its items in the grid.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create the section: not visible on this screen yet.
